segments.text: Praise the Lord from the heavens; Praise Him in the heights!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him, all His angels; Praise Him, all His hosts!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all you stars of light!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Praise Him, you heavens of heavens, And you waters above the heavens!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise the name of the Lord, For He commanded and they were created.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He also established them forever and ever; He made a decree which shall not pass away.
Praise the Lord from the earth, You great sea creatures and all the depths;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Fire and hail, snow and clouds; Stormy wind, fulfilling His word;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Mountains and all hills; Fruitful trees and all cedars;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Beasts and all cattle; Creeping things and flying fowl;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Kings of the earth and all peoples; Princes and all judges of the earth;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Both young men and maidens; Old men and children.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise the name of the Lord, For His name alone is exalted; His glory is above the earth and heaven.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: And He has exalted the horn of His people, The praise of all His saints— Of the children of Israel, A people near to Him.
